---
name: RFC (Request for Comments)
about: Propose a protocol specification change
title: '[RFC] '
labels: rfc
assignees: ''
---

## Motivation
Why is this change necessary? What problem does it solve, and what use cases does it enable?

## Spec Section Affected
Which parts of the AMP protocol or implementation specification are affected by this proposal?

## Detailed Proposal
Describe the design in detail. Include any changes to protocol messages, fields, state machines, or expected behaviors.

## Backwards Compatibility
Will this change break existing clients or servers? If so, how will we manage the transition/migration?

## Alternatives
What other designs or workarounds were considered, and why were they rejected?
